events.label: assistant
events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`. Decision: **fail**, risk **critical** — the disconnect was pulled but not locked/tagged, no absence-of-voltage check was done before opening the inverter, the OEM capacitor discharge wait was skipped, and the Class 0 gloves are 9 months out of dielectric test. Work must stop until lockout/tagout, a verified meter check, and compliant gloves are in place.
